sample.q: What is a name for a type of private club in city outskirts or rural areas that usually offers a variety of recreational sports facilities such as golf, tennis, swimming and polo?
Which month of the year came second in the Roman calendar?
Introduced in 1894 and one of the world's oldest trademarks, Bibendum is better known as what?
How many ‘Triangles’ are there on the logo of car manufacturer BMW?
What is the next in the series: 1, 16, 81, 256, 625 ?
gold: one thousand, two hundred and ninety-six
